display.purpose: Entry titles and authenticated page identity only.

body.purpose: Instructions, controls, status, analytics, and code-adjacent copy.

label.purpose: Compact navigation, field labels, and control text.

shadows.name: console-ambient
shadows.purpose: Elevates the single outer console from the page void.

shadows.name: recessed-well
shadows.purpose: Creates mechanical depth for fields and command surfaces.

shadows.name: raised-control
shadows.purpose: Marks selected or immediately actionable controls.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, active, and compact UI state changes.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Rare ceremonial hero or access-state reveal, with reduced-motion fallback.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Reflows the navigation rail into a grouped path selector and protects command/table width.

narrative.componentPhilosophy: Quiet until selected; tactile and mechanical where interaction benefits from physical depth.
